text.value: The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The IG is not for the international realm, and it uses SNOMED CT, so it should fix the SCT edition in the expansion parameters
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is a valid display for the default language
There are no valid display names found for the code http://snomed.info/sct#129006008 for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Walking' which is a valid display for the default language
A definition for CodeSystem 'http://hl7.dk/fhir/core/CodeSystem/dk-core-regional-subdivision-codes' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is a valid display for the default language
The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-maxValueSet|5.3.0 is deprecated with the note: 'Use additionalBinding extension or element instead'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare|5.3.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/workflow-episodeOfCare|5.3.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/address-official'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/address-official' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/address-official|5.3.0'
The slice 'official' on path 'Patient.name' is not marked as 'must-support' which is not consistent with the element that defines the slicing, where 'must-support' is true

The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile

Value sets published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is a valid display for the default language
The expression is grammatically correct and the concepts are valid, but the expression has not been checked against the SNOMED CT concept model (MRCM)
The expression is grammatically correct and the concepts are valid, but the expression has not been checked against the SNOMED CT concept model (MRCM)
Value sets published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present

Conformance resource /Users/jkiddo/work/temp/ig-builds/hl7.fhir.dk.hackathons#1.0.0-milestone/input/profiles/MentalHealthQuestionnaire.json - the canonical URL (http://hl7.dk/fhir/hackathons/Questionnaire/MentalHealthQuestionnaire) does not match the URL (http://hl7.org/fhir/Questionnaire/MentalHealthQuestionnaire). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is a valid display for the default language
When HL7 is publishing a resource, the owning committee must be stated using the http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-wg extension
URL Mismatch http://hl7.dk/fhir/hackathons/Questionnaire/MentalHealthQuestionnaire vs http://hl7.org/fhir/Questionnaire/MentalHealthQuestionnaire

Conformance resource /Users/jkiddo/work/temp/ig-builds/hl7.fhir.dk.hackathons#1.0.0-milestone/input/vocabulary/CodeSystem-MentalHealthCodes.json - the canonical URL (http://hl7.dk/fhir/hackathons/CodeSystem/MentalHealthCodes) does not match the URL (http://hl7.dk/fhir/Hackathon-Sep-2022/CodeSystem/MentalHealthCodes). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DK for language(s) 'da-DK'. The display is 'Denmark' which is a valid display for the default language
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.name should be present, but it is not
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
HL7 Defined CodeSystems should ensure that every concept has a definition
URL Mismatch http://hl7.dk/fhir/hackathons/CodeSystem/MentalHealthCodes vs http://hl7.dk/fhir/Hackathon-Sep-2022/CodeSystem/MentalHealthCodes

Conformance resource /Users/jkiddo/work/temp/ig-builds/hl7.fhir.dk.hackathons#1.0.0-milestone/input/vocabulary/ValueSet-DesireToBeWithOthersCodes.json - the canonical URL (http://hl7.dk/fhir/hackathons/ValueSet/DesireToBeWithOthersCodes) does not match the URL (http://hl7.dk/fhir/Hackathon-Sep-2022/ValueSet/DesireToBeWithOthersCodes).
